exactness_rows.description: Checkpointed three-bank replay forces delayed last-write recovery after repeated overwrites and selector gaps.
Branchy stack-memory braid exercises stack-relative reads under deeper control and alternating indirect updates.
Alternating memory loop keeps loop-carried state alive across repeated flag-controlled updates and delayed reads.
Two-level nested call/return chain tests return-target reconstruction without hidden call-stack side state.
Restricted tiny-C histogram row increases bounded static-memory pressure without widening to arbitrary C.

tinyc_program.name: tinyc_histogram16_u8_len12_a832
